texto: Sometimes we have to think of the worst so we can figure out how to pick up the pieces and move on. Don't let life slap you with a cold shock
autor: consider all the negative outcomes so you can live a more positive life. You'll make wiser choices and not dwell on all the perils that can befall you. - William
explicacao: Orientação direta de consider all the negative outcomes so you can live a more positive life. You'll make wiser choices and not dwell on all the perils that can befall you. - William sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Sometimes we have to think of the worst so we can figure out how to pick up the pieces and move o…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, dannika-dark, one-second, útil em momentos de reflexao-noturna e one-second.
